plugin.name: Mushkin_Audit
plugin.author: Mushkin Project
plugin.purpose: Behavioral baseline capture for Mushkin vs MUSHclient comparison
plugin.description: Mushkin Audit -- Behavioral baseline capture plugin. Type 'audit' to run all tests and capture API behavior to JSON.

muclient.script:
-- ============================================================ -- JSON Encoder -- Self-contained, no external dependencies. -- Works in Lua 5.1 (MUSHclient) and LuaJIT/5.1-compat (Mushkin). -- Keys are sorted at ALL nesting levels for stable diffs. -- ============================================================
local function is_array(t) -- A table is an array if all keys are consecutive integers starting at 1. local count = 0 for _ in pairs(t) do count = count + 1 end if count == 0 then -- Empty table: treat as array (produces []) return true end for i = 1, count do if t[i] == nil then return false end end return true end
local function json_encode_inner(value, indent) local vtype = type(value)
if value == nil then return "null" elseif vtype == "boolean" then return value and "true" or "false" elseif vtype == "number" then if value ~= value then -- NaN return '"NaN"' elseif value == math.huge then return '"Infinity"' elseif value == -math.huge then return '"-Infinity"' else -- Use integer representation when value is a whole number if value == math.floor(value) and math.abs(value) < 1e15 then return string.format("%d", value) else return string.format("%.17g", value) end end elseif vtype == "string" then -- Escape special characters local s = value s = s:gsub('\\', '\\\\') s = s:gsub('"', '\\"') s = s:gsub('\n', '\\n') s = s:gsub('\r', '\\r') s = s:gsub('\t', '\\t') -- Escape remaining control characters (U+0000–U+001F) s = s:gsub('[\0-\31]', function(c) return string.format('\\u%04x', c:byte()) end) return '"' .. s .. '"' elseif vtype == "table" then local inner_indent = indent .. " "
if is_array(value) then -- Array encoding if #value == 0 then return "[]" end local parts = {} for i = 1, #value do parts[i] = inner_indent .. json_encode_inner(value[i], inner_indent) end return "[\n" .. table.concat(parts, ",\n") .. "\n" .. indent .. "]" else -- Object encoding — collect and sort keys local keys = {} for k in pairs(value) do keys[#keys + 1] = k end -- Sort: numbers first (numerically), then strings (lexicographically) table.sort(keys, function(a, b) local ta, tb = type(a), type(b) if ta == tb then return a < b end -- numbers before strings return ta == "number" end)
if #keys == 0 then return "{}" end
local parts = {} for _, k in ipairs(keys) do -- Use direct lookup — NOT `val[k] or val[tonumber(k)]` -- which would incorrectly skip false values. local v = value[k] local key_str = json_encode_inner(tostring(k), inner_indent) parts[#parts + 1] = inner_indent .. key_str .. ": " .. json_encode_inner(v, inner_indent) end return "{\n" .. table.concat(parts, ",\n") .. "\n" .. indent .. "}" end else -- Functions, userdata, threads: represent as a quoted type string return '"<' .. vtype .. '>"' end end
function json_encode(value) return json_encode_inner(value, "") end
-- ============================================================ -- Test Suite -- ============================================================
local pass_count = 0 local fail_count = 0
local function check(label, got, expected) if got == expected then pass_count = pass_count + 1 ColourNote("lime", "black", " PASS " .. label) else fail_count = fail_count + 1 ColourNote("red", "black", " FAIL " .. label) ColourNote("red", "black", " got: " .. tostring(got)) ColourNote("red", "black", " expected: " .. tostring(expected)) end end
function test_json() pass_count = 0 fail_count = 0
ColourNote("white", "black", "--- json_encode test suite ---")
-- Empty table (array) check("empty table", json_encode({}), "[]")
-- Simple array check("simple array", json_encode({1, 2, 3}), "[\n 1,\n 2,\n 3\n]")
-- Boolean true check("boolean true", json_encode(true), "true")
-- Boolean false check("boolean false", json_encode(false), "false")
-- nil check("nil", json_encode(nil), "null")
-- Integer number check("integer", json_encode(42), "42")
-- Float number check("float", json_encode(3.14), string.format("%.17g", 3.14))
-- NaN check("NaN", json_encode(0/0), '"NaN"')
-- Positive infinity check("Infinity", json_encode(math.huge), '"Infinity"')
-- Negative infinity check("-Infinity", json_encode(-math.huge), '"-Infinity"')
-- Empty string check("empty string", json_encode(""), '""')
-- String with special chars check("string special chars", json_encode('say "hello"\nworld\t!'), '"say \\"hello\\"\\nworld\\t!"')
-- String with backslash check("string backslash", json_encode("a\\b"), '"a\\\\b"')
-- Unicode passthrough (Lua 5.1 strings are byte strings) -- Use decimal escapes (\195\169 = UTF-8 for é) since \xNN is Lua 5.2+ local utf8_e_acute = "\195\169" check("unicode passthrough", json_encode(utf8_e_acute), '"' .. utf8_e_acute .. '"')
-- Simple object with sorted keys check("simple object sorted keys", json_encode({b = 2, a = 1}), '{\n "a": 1,\n "b": 2\n}')
-- Object with false value (must not be skipped) check("object false value", json_encode({flag = false}), '{\n "flag": false\n}')
-- Object with nil value (nil keys are invisible in Lua tables, so this -- tests that a key whose value is false isn't confused with nil) local t = {present = false, missing = nil} check("false vs nil in object", json_encode(t), '{\n "present": false\n}')
-- Nested tables check("nested object", json_encode({outer = {inner = 1}}), '{\n "outer": {\n "inner": 1\n }\n}')
-- Mixed nesting: array of objects check("array of objects", json_encode({{a=1},{a=2}}), '[\n {\n "a": 1\n },\n {\n "a": 2\n }\n]')
-- Mixed integer/string keys — integer keys sort before string keys local mixed = {} mixed[1] = "one" mixed["x"] = "ex" check("mixed keys order", json_encode(mixed), '{\n "1": "one",\n "x": "ex"\n}')
-- Summary local total = pass_count + fail_count ColourNote("white", "black", string.format( "--- %d/%d passed, %d failed ---", pass_count, total, fail_count)) end
-- ============================================================ -- Data Collection Functions -- ============================================================
function collect_metadata() local t = {}
-- Capture date t.capture_date = os.date("!%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
-- Detect client from Version() string local ok, ver = pcall(Version) if ok then t.client_version = tostring(ver) if ver and ver:lower():find("mushkin") then t.client_name = "Mushkin" else t.client_name = "MUSHclient" end else t.client_version = "__error__: " .. tostring(ver) t.client_name = "unknown" end
-- World name local ok2, wn = pcall(WorldName) t.world_name = ok2 and tostring(wn) or ("__error__: " .. tostring(wn))
-- Plugin count local ok3, pl = pcall(GetPluginList) if ok3 and type(pl) == "table" then t.plugin_count = #pl else t.plugin_count = "__error__: " .. tostring(pl) end
-- World file path via GetInfo(70) and hash local ok4, wf = pcall(GetInfo, 70) if ok4 and type(wf) == "string" and wf ~= "" then local f = io.open(wf, "rb") if f then local contents = f:read("*a") f:close() local ok5, h = pcall(Hash, contents, 3) -- 3 = SHA-256 t.world_file_hash = ok5 and tostring(h) or ("__hash_error__: " .. tostring(h)) else t.world_file_hash = "__cannot_open_file__" end else t.world_file_hash = "__getinfo70_error__: " .. tostring(wf) end
return t end
function collect_getinfo() local t = {} for i = 1, 310 do local ok, val = pcall(GetInfo, i) if ok then local vtype = type(val) if vtype == "string" or vtype == "number" or vtype == "boolean" or val == nil then t[i] = val else t[i] = "<" .. vtype .. ">" end else t[i] = "__error__: " .. tostring(val) end end return t end
function collect_options() local numeric_names = { "alternative_inverse", "alt_arrow_recalls_partial", "always_record_command_history", "arrows_change_history", "arrow_keys_wrap", "arrow_recalls_partial", "autosay_exclude_macros", "autosay_exclude_non_alpha", "auto_copy_to_clipboard_in_html", "auto_pause", "keep_pause_at_bottom", "auto_repeat", "auto_resize_command_window", "auto_resize_minimum_lines", "auto_resize_maximum_lines", "append_to_log_file", "auto_wrap_window_width", "carriage_return_clears_line", "confirm_before_replacing_typing", "confirm_on_paste", "confirm_on_send", "connect_method", "copy_selection_to_clipboard", "convert_ga_to_newline", "ctrl_n_goes_to_next_command", "ctrl_p_goes_to_previous_command", "ctrl_z_goes_to_end_of_buffer", "ctrl_backspace_deletes_last_word", "custom_16_is_default_colour", "default_trigger_send_to", "default_trigger_sequence", "default_trigger_regexp", "default_trigger_expand_variables", "default_trigger_keep_evaluating", "default_trigger_ignore_case", "default_alias_send_to", "default_alias_sequence", "default_alias_regexp", "default_alias_expand_variables", "default_alias_keep_evaluating", "default_alias_ignore_case", "default_timer_send_to", "detect_pueblo", "do_not_add_macros_to_command_history", "do_not_show_outstanding_lines", "do_not_translate_iac_to_iac_iac", "disable_compression", "display_my_input", "double_click_inserts", "double_click_sends", "echo_colour", "echo_hyperlink_in_output_window", "edit_script_with_notepad", "enable_aliases", "enable_auto_say", "enable_beeps", "enable_command_stack", "enable_scripts", "enable_spam_prevention", "enable_speed_walk", "enable_timers", "enable_triggers", "enable_trigger_sounds", "escape_deletes_input", "fade_output_buffer_after_seconds", "fade_output_opacity_percent", "fade_output_seconds", "flash_taskbar_icon", "history_lines", "hyperlink_adds_to_command_history", "hyperlink_colour", "ignore_mxp_colour_changes", "indent_paras", "input_background_colour", "input_font_height", "input_font_italic", "input_font_weight", "input_font_charset", "input_text_colour", "keep_commands_on_same_line", "keypad_enable", "line_information", "line_spacing", "log_html", "log_input", "log_in_colour", "log_lines", "log_notes", "log_output", "log_raw", "log_script_errors", "lower_case_tab_completion", "map_failure_regexp", "max_output_lines", "mud_can_change_link_colour", "mud_can_remove_underline", "mud_can_change_options", "mxp_debug_level", "naws", "use_msp", "note_text_colour", "no_echo_off", "omit_date_from_save_files", "output_font_height", "output_font_weight", "output_font_charset", "paste_commented_softcode", "paste_delay", "paste_delay_per_lines", "paste_echo", "play_sounds_in_background", "pixel_offset", "port", "proxy_port", "proxy_type", "re_evaluate_auto_say", "save_deleted_command", "save_world_automatically", "script_reload_option", "script_errors_to_output_window", "send_echo", "send_file_commented_softcode", "send_file_delay", "send_file_delay_per_lines", "send_keep_alives", "send_mxp_afk_response", "show_bold", "show_connect_disconnect", "show_italic", "show_underline", "spam_line_count", "speed_walk_delay", "spell_check_on_send", "start_paused", "tab_completion_lines", "tab_completion_space", "timestamp_input_text_colour", "timestamp_notes_text_colour", "timestamp_output_text_colour", "timestamp_input_back_colour", "timestamp_notes_back_colour", "timestamp_output_back_colour", "tool_tip_visible_time", "tool_tip_start_time", "translate_backslash_sequences", "translate_german", "treeview_triggers", "treeview_aliases", "treeview_timers", "underline_hyperlinks", "unpause_on_send", "use_custom_link_colour", "use_default_aliases", "use_default_colours", "use_default_input_font", "use_default_macros", "use_default_output_font", "use_default_timers", "use_default_triggers", "use_mxp", "utf_8", "warn_if_scripting_inactive", "wrap", "wrap_input", "wrap_column", "write_world_name_to_log", "remote_access_enabled", "remote_port", "remote_scrollback_lines", "remote_max_clients", }
local alpha_names = { "auto_log_file_name", "auto_say_override_prefix", "auto_say_string", "beep_sound", "command_stack_character", "connect_text", "editor_window_name", "filter_aliases", "filter_timers", "filter_triggers", "filter_variables", "id", "input_font_name", "log_file_postamble", "log_file_preamble", "log_line_postamble_input", "log_line_postamble_notes", "log_line_postamble_output", "log_line_preamble_input", "log_line_preamble_notes", "log_line_preamble_output", "mapping_failure", "name", "new_activity_sound", "notes", "on_mxp_close_tag", "on_mxp_error", "on_mxp_open_tag", "on_mxp_set_variable", "on_mxp_start", "on_mxp_stop", "on_world_close", "on_world_save", "on_world_connect", "on_world_disconnect", "on_world_get_focus", "on_world_lose_focus", "on_world_open", "output_font_name", "password", "proxy_password", "proxy_server", "proxy_username", "paste_line_postamble", "paste_line_preamble", "paste_postamble", "paste_preamble", "player", "recall_line_preamble", "script_editor", "script_editor_argument", "script_filename", "script_language", "script_prefix", "send_to_world_file_postamble", "send_to_world_file_preamble", "send_to_world_line_postamble", "send_to_world_line_preamble", "site", "spam_message", "speed_walk_filler", "speed_walk_prefix", "tab_completion_defaults", "terminal_identification", "timestamp_input", "timestamp_notes", "timestamp_output", "remote_password", "remote_authorized_keys", }
local t = { numeric = {}, alpha = {} }
for _, name in ipairs(numeric_names) do local ok, val = pcall(GetOption, name) if ok then t.numeric[name] = val else t.numeric[name] = "__error__: " .. tostring(val) end end
for _, name in ipairs(alpha_names) do local ok, val = pcall(GetAlphaOption, name) if ok then t.alpha[name] = val else t.alpha[name] = "__error__: " .. tostring(val) end end
return t end
function collect_plugins() local t = {}
local ok, ids = pcall(GetPluginList) if not ok then return { __error__ = tostring(ids) } end if type(ids) ~= "table" then return { __error__ = "GetPluginList returned " .. type(ids) } end
for _, id in ipairs(ids) do local entry = { id = id }
-- GetPluginInfo fields 1-28 entry.info = {} for i = 1, 28 do local ok2, val = pcall(GetPluginInfo, id, i) if ok2 then local vtype = type(val) if vtype == "string" or vtype == "number" or vtype == "boolean" or val == nil then entry.info[i] = val else entry.info[i] = "<" .. vtype .. ">" end else entry.info[i] = "__error__: " .. tostring(val) end end
-- Variable list for this plugin local ok3, varlist = pcall(GetPluginVariableList, id) entry.variables = {} if ok3 and type(varlist) == "table" then for k, _ in pairs(varlist) do local ok4, v = pcall(GetPluginVariable, id, tostring(k)) entry.variables[tostring(k)] = ok4 and v or ("__error__: " .. tostring(v)) end elseif ok3 then entry.variables.__type__ = type(varlist) else entry.variables.__error__ = tostring(varlist) end
t[#t + 1] = entry end
return t end
function collect_miniwindows() local t = {}
local ok, wins = pcall(WindowList) if not ok then return { __error__ = tostring(wins) } end if type(wins) ~= "table" then return { __type__ = type(wins) } end
for _, win in ipairs(wins) do local entry = { id = win }
-- WindowInfo fields 1-18 entry.info = {} for i = 1, 18 do local ok2, val = pcall(WindowInfo, win, i) if ok2 then local vtype = type(val) if vtype == "string" or vtype == "number" or vtype == "boolean" or val == nil then entry.info[i] = val else entry.info[i] = "<" .. vtype .. ">" end else entry.info[i] = "__error__: " .. tostring(val) end end
-- Font list for this window local ok3, fonts = pcall(WindowFontList, win) entry.fonts = {} if ok3 and type(fonts) == "table" then for _, fid in ipairs(fonts) do local fentry = {} for j = 1, 20 do local ok4, fv = pcall(WindowFontInfo, win, fid, j) if ok4 then local vtype = type(fv) if vtype == "string" or vtype == "number" or vtype == "boolean" or fv == nil then fentry[j] = fv else fentry[j] = "<" .. vtype .. ">" end else fentry[j] = "__error__: " .. tostring(fv) end end entry.fonts[fid] = fentry end elseif ok3 then entry.fonts.__type__ = type(fonts) else entry.fonts.__error__ = tostring(fonts) end
t[#t + 1] = entry end
return t end
function collect_api_availability() -- Complete list of functions registered in the world table (worldlib) -- plus array functions (world_arrays.cpp) and additional globals. -- Extracted from lua_registration.cpp and world_arrays.cpp. local api_names = { -- Output functions "Note", "Trim", "ColourNote", "ColourTell", "Tell", "ANSI", "AnsiNote", "Hyperlink", "Simulate", -- Text manipulation "DeleteLines", "DeleteOutput", "SetSelection", -- Display/UI "Bookmark", "SetUnseenLines", "ResetStatusTime", "Transparency", -- Info bar "Info", "InfoClear", "InfoColour", "InfoColor", "InfoBackground", "InfoFont", "ShowInfoBar", -- Network "Send", "SendNoEcho", "SendImmediate", "SendPush", "SendSpecial", "Connect", "Disconnect", "IsConnected", -- Variable "GetVariable", "SetVariable", "DeleteVariable", "GetVariableList", -- World info "GetInfo", "GetOption", "SetOption", "GetAlphaOption", "SetAlphaOption", "GetCurrentValue", "GetDefaultValue", "GetLoadedValue", "SetStatus", "Repaint", "TextRectangle", "SetBackgroundImage", "SetScroll", "GetCommand", "SetCommand", "SetCommandSelection", "SetCommandWindowHeight", "GetLineCount", "GetSentBytes", "GetReceivedBytes", "GetConnectDuration", "WorldAddress", "WorldPort", "WorldName", "Version", "GetLinesInBufferCount", "GetSelectionStartLine", "GetSelectionEndLine", "GetSelectionStartColumn", "GetSelectionEndColumn", "GetSysColor", "GetSystemMetrics", "GetDeviceCaps", "GetFrame", "GetAlphaOptionList", "GetOptionList", "GetGlobalOptionList", "Queue", "DiscardQueue", "DoCommand", "GetInternalCommandsList", "Help", -- Color "GetNormalColour", "GetBoldColour", "SetNormalColour", "SetBoldColour", "GetCustomColourText", "GetCustomColourBackground", "SetCustomColourText", "SetCustomColourBackground", "SetCustomColourName", "GetCustomColourName", "PickColour", "AdjustColour", "NormalColour", "BoldColour", "CustomColourText", "CustomColourBackground", "ColourNameToRGB", "RGBColourToName", -- Trace/Echo/Speedwalk "GetTrace", "SetTrace", "GetEchoInput", "SetEchoInput", "GetSpeedWalkDelay", "SetSpeedWalkDelay", "EchoInput", "SpeedWalkDelay", "EvaluateSpeedwalk", "ReverseSpeedwalk", "RemoveBacktracks", -- Triggers "AddTrigger", "DeleteTrigger", "EnableTrigger", "GetTrigger", "GetTriggerInfo", "GetTriggerList", "IsTrigger", "EnableTriggerGroup", "DeleteTriggerGroup", "DeleteTemporaryTriggers", "GetTriggerOption", "SetTriggerOption", "AddTriggerEx", "StopEvaluatingTriggers", -- Aliases "AddAlias", "DeleteAlias", "EnableAlias", "GetAlias", "GetAliasInfo", "GetAliasList", "IsAlias", "EnableAliasGroup", "DeleteAliasGroup", "DeleteTemporaryAliases", "GetAliasOption", "SetAliasOption", -- Timers "AddTimer", "DeleteTimer", "EnableTimer", "GetTimer", "GetTimerInfo", "IsTimer", "GetTimerList", "ResetTimer", "ResetTimers", "DoAfter", "DoAfterNote", "DoAfterSpeedWalk", "DoAfterSpecial", "EnableTimerGroup", "DeleteTimerGroup", "DeleteTemporaryTimers", "GetTimerOption", "SetTimerOption", -- Utility "Hash", "Base64Encode", "Base64Decode", "GenerateName", "ReadNamesFile", "TranslateGerman", "LowercaseWildcard", "GetUniqueNumber", "GetUniqueID", "CreateGUID", "StripANSI", "FixupEscapeSequences", "FixupHTML", "MakeRegularExpression", "Execute", "GetGlobalOption", "SetCursor", "Accelerator", "AcceleratorList", "AcceleratorTo", "Activate", "ActivateClient", "GetWorldID", "GetWorldList", "GetWorldIdList", "GetWorld", "GetWorldById", "Open", "Reset", "EditDistance", "OpenBrowser", "ChangeDir", "TranslateDebug", "GetUdpPort", "UdpSend", "UdpListen", "UdpPortList", "SpellCheck", "SpellCheckDlg", "SpellCheckCommand", "AddSpellCheckWord", "Metaphone", "ResetIP", "ImportXML", "ExportXML", "EnableGroup", "DeleteGroup", "GetClipboard", "SetClipboard", "ErrorDesc", "Replace", "Save", "GetLineInfo", "GetStyleInfo", "GetRecentLines", "Menu", "NoteColour", "NoteColourFore", "NoteColourBack", "NoteColourRGB", "NoteColourName", "GetNoteColour", "GetNoteColourFore", "GetNoteColourBack", "SetNoteColour", "SetNoteColourFore", "SetNoteColourBack", "NoteStyle", "GetNoteStyle", "NoteHr", "PasteCommand", "GetCommandList", "SelectCommand", "GetQueue", "ShiftTabCompleteItem", "GetTriggerWildcard", "GetAliasWildcard", "Trace", "TraceOut", "Debug", -- World notes "GetNotes", "SetNotes", -- Command history "DeleteCommandHistory", "PushCommand", -- Document state "SetChanged", -- Logging "OpenLog", "CloseLog", "WriteLog", "FlushLog", "IsLogOpen", "OmitFromLogFile", "GetLogInput", "SetLogInput", "GetLogNotes", "SetLogNotes", "GetLogOutput", "SetLogOutput", "LogInput", "LogNotes", "LogOutput", "LogSend", -- Random "MtRand", "MtSrand", -- Network info "GetHostAddress", "GetHostName", -- Script timing "GetScriptTime", -- UI Control "FlashIcon", "Redraw", "Pause", "SetTitle", "SetMainTitle", "GetMainWindowPosition", "GetWorldWindowPosition", "GetWorldWindowPositionX", "MoveMainWindow", "MoveWorldWindow", "MoveWorldWindowX", "SetBackgroundColour", "SetOutputFont", "SetInputFont", "SetWorldWindowStatus", "SetForegroundImage", "SetFrameBackgroundColour", "SetToolBarPosition", -- Database "DatabaseOpen", "DatabaseClose", "DatabasePrepare", "DatabaseStep", "DatabaseFinalize", "DatabaseExec", "DatabaseColumns", "DatabaseColumnType", "DatabaseReset", "DatabaseChanges", "DatabaseTotalChanges", "DatabaseError", "DatabaseColumnName", "DatabaseColumnText", "DatabaseColumnValue", "DatabaseColumnNames", "DatabaseColumnValues", "DatabaseGetField", "DatabaseInfo", "DatabaseLastInsertRowid", "DatabaseList", -- Plugin "GetPluginID", "GetPluginName", "GetPluginList", "IsPluginInstalled", "GetPluginInfo", "LoadPlugin", "ReloadPlugin", "UnloadPlugin", "EnablePlugin", "CallPlugin", "PluginSupports", "BroadcastPlugin", "SendPkt", "SaveState", "GetPluginVariable", "GetPluginVariableList", "GetPluginTriggerList", "GetPluginAliasList", "GetPluginTimerList", "GetPluginTriggerInfo", "GetPluginAliasInfo", "GetPluginTimerInfo", "GetPluginTriggerOption", "GetPluginAliasOption", "GetPluginTimerOption", "AddFont", -- Miniwindow "WindowCreate", "WindowShow", "WindowPosition", "WindowSetZOrder", "WindowDelete", "WindowInfo", "WindowResize", -- Miniwindow drawing "WindowRectOp", "WindowCircleOp", "WindowLine", "WindowPolygon", "WindowGradient", "WindowSetPixel", "WindowGetPixel", "WindowArc", "WindowBezier", -- Miniwindow text/fonts "WindowFont", "WindowText", "WindowTextWidth", "WindowFontInfo", "WindowFontList", -- Miniwindow image "WindowLoadImage", "WindowDrawImage", "WindowBlendImage", "WindowImageFromWindow", "WindowImageInfo", "WindowImageList", "WindowWrite", "WindowGetImageAlpha", "WindowDrawImageAlpha", "WindowMergeImageAlpha", "WindowTransformImage", "WindowFilter", -- Pixel helpers "BlendPixel", "FilterPixel", -- Miniwindow hotspots "WindowAddHotspot", "WindowDeleteHotspot", "WindowDeleteAllHotspots", "WindowHotspotTooltip", "WindowDragHandler", "WindowMenu", "WindowHotspotInfo", "WindowMoveHotspot", "WindowScrollwheelHandler", "WindowList", "WindowHotspotList", "WindowCreateImage", "WindowImageOp", "WindowLoadImageMemory", -- Sound "PlaySound", "StopSound", "Sound", "GetSoundStatus", "PlaySoundMemory", -- Notepad "SendToNotepad", "AppendToNotepad", "ReplaceNotepad", "ActivateNotepad", "CloseNotepad", "GetNotepadText", "GetNotepadLength", "GetNotepadList", "SaveNotepad", "NotepadFont", "NotepadColour", "NotepadReadOnly", "NotepadSaveMethod", "MoveNotepadWindow", "GetNotepadWindowPosition", -- MXP/entity "GetEntity", "GetXMLEntity", "SetEntity", -- Mapper "AddToMapper", "AddMapperComment", "DeleteAllMapItems", "DeleteLastMapItem", "EnableMapping", "GetMappingCount", "GetMappingItem", "GetMappingString", "GetMapping", "SetMapping", "GetMapColour", "MapColour", "MapColourList", "GetRemoveMapReverses", "SetRemoveMapReverses", -- Array functions (world_arrays.cpp) "ArrayCreate", "ArrayDelete", "ArrayClear", "ArraySet", "ArrayGet", "ArrayDeleteKey", "ArrayExists", "ArrayKeyExists", "ArrayCount", "ArraySize", "ArrayGetFirstKey", "ArrayGetLastKey", "ArrayList", "ArrayListAll", "ArrayListKeys", "ArrayListValues", "ArrayExport", "ArrayExportKeys", "ArrayImport", -- print override "print", }
local t = {} for _, name in ipairs(api_names) do t[name] = type(_G[name]) end return t end
function collect_lua_environment() local t = {}
t._VERSION = _VERSION
-- JIT t.jit_present = (type(jit) ~= "nil") if type(jit) == "table" then t.jit_version = tostring(jit.version) end
-- Common libraries t.bit_present = (type(bit) ~= "nil") t.bit32_present = (type(bit32) ~= "nil") t.utf8_present = (type(utf8) ~= "nil")
-- Package if type(package) == "table" then t.package_path = tostring(package.path) t.package_cpath = tostring(package.cpath)
-- Lua 5.1 uses package.loaders; 5.2+ uses package.searchers if type(package.loaders) ~= "nil" then t.package_loaders_type = type(package.loaders) local ok, n = pcall(function() local c = 0 for _ in pairs(package.loaders) do c = c + 1 end return c end) t.package_loaders_count = ok and n or "__error__" else t.package_loaders_type = "nil" t.package_loaders_count = 0 end
if type(package.searchers) ~= "nil" then t.package_searchers_type = type(package.searchers) else t.package_searchers_type = "nil" end else t.package_present = false end
return t end
function collect_error_probes() local t = {}
-- Nonexistent numeric option local ok, val = pcall(GetOption, "nonexistent_option_xyzzy") t.getopt_nonexistent = ok and val or ("__error__: " .. tostring(val))
-- Out-of-range GetInfo local ok2, val2 = pcall(GetInfo, 99999) t.getinfo_99999 = ok2 and val2 or ("__error__: " .. tostring(val2))
-- Nonexistent variable local ok3, val3 = pcall(GetVariable, "nonexistent_variable_xyzzy") t.getvar_nonexistent = ok3 and val3 or ("__error__: " .. tostring(val3))
-- Nonexistent miniwindow info local ok4, val4 = pcall(WindowInfo, "nonexistent_window_xyzzy", 1) t.windowinfo_nonexistent = ok4 and val4 or ("__error__: " .. tostring(val4))
return t end
function collect_error_codes() local t = {} if type(error_code) == "table" then for k, v in pairs(error_code) do t[tostring(k)] = v end else t.__present__ = false t.__type__ = type(error_code) end return t end
-- ============================================================ -- Entry Point -- ============================================================
function run_audit() local t0 = os.clock() local data = { metadata = collect_metadata(), getinfo = collect_getinfo(), options = collect_options(), plugins = collect_plugins(), miniwindows = collect_miniwindows(), api_availability = collect_api_availability(), lua_environment = collect_lua_environment(), error_probes = collect_error_probes(), error_codes = collect_error_codes(), } local json_str = json_encode(data) local path = GetInfo(66) .. "audit_baseline.json" local f, err = io.open(path, "w") if not f then ColourNote("white", "red", "AUDIT ERROR: Cannot write to " .. path .. ": " .. tostring(err)) return end f:write(json_str) f:close() local elapsed = os.clock() - t0 -- Count top-level items across all sections local count = 0 for _, tbl in pairs(data) do if type(tbl) == "table" then for _ in pairs(tbl) do count = count + 1 end end end ColourNote("lime", "black", string.format("AUDIT COMPLETE: %d items captured in %.2fs", count, elapsed)) ColourNote("lime", "black", "Written to: " .. path) end
-- Print a startup notice when the plugin loads ColourNote("white", "black", "Mushkin_Audit loaded. Type 'audit' to run.")
